title: 2026 U.S. Senate election in Colorado
description: Voters in Colorado will elect one member to the U.S. Senate on November 3, 2026, with the primary scheduled for June 30, 2026. The race is for the Class II seat held by incumbent Democrat John Hickenlooper, and the contest is drawing attention because Hickenlooper faces a Democratic primary challenge from state Sen. Julie Gonzales while Republicans are competing to become the general-election nominee.
polling_note: No public general-election polling found for this race as of 2026-04-01.

candidates.name: John Hickenlooper
candidates.summary: John Hickenlooper is the incumbent Democratic U.S. senator from Colorado seeking reelection in 2026. In March 2026, he qualified for the Democratic primary ballot by petition and has continued to report strong fundraising and endorsements from groups including Planned Parenthood Action and an environmental organization.

summary_sources.title: Democratic US Sen. John Hickenlooper qualifies for Colorado primary by petition, will skip assembly
Hickenlooper endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action, environmental group in Colorado's U.S. Senate race
Colorado Democrat John Hickenlooper raises over $1.1 million in 4th quarter for reelection bid

career_history.title: Governor
career_history.description: Served two terms as governor of Colorado.

career_history.title: Mayor
career_history.description: Served two terms as Denver mayor.

career_history.title: Geologist and businessman
career_history.description: Worked as a petroleum geologist and later co-founded one of Colorado's first brewpubs.

candidates.name: Karen Breslin
candidates.summary: Karen Breslin is listed by Ballotpedia as a candidate in the Democratic primary for Colorado's 2026 U.S. Senate race. Publicly available biographical information was limited in the sources reviewed, so her broader career history and education could not be confirmed from the materials found.

summary_sources.title: United States Senate election in Colorado, 2026 - Ballotpedia

candidates.name: Julie Gonzales
candidates.summary: Julie Gonzales is a Democratic state senator from Denver who launched a primary challenge to incumbent U.S. Sen. John Hickenlooper in December 2025. In February 2026, a Working Families Party-backed poll showed her closing the gap with Hickenlooper after voters were given more information about the candidates.

summary_sources.title: Colorado Democrat Julie Gonzales launches U.S. Senate primary challenge to incumbent John Hickenlooper
Colorado Senate Democratic Primary Poll Summary of Findings

candidates.name: Mark Baisley
candidates.summary: Mark Baisley is a Republican Colorado state senator who left the gubernatorial race in January 2026 and entered the U.S. Senate contest against incumbent Democrat John Hickenlooper. His campaign announcement shifted him into the Senate primary field as one of the Republican candidates seeking the nomination.

summary_sources.title: Colorado Republican Mark Baisley exits gubernatorial race, launches U.S. Senate campaign
